name: given no connection-id is provided as an argument when running mesheryctl connection view --output-format then a message error is displayed

statusDetails.message:
(from function `assert_output' in file /usr/lib/bats-assert/src/assert_output.bash, line 186,
 in test file 007-connection/03-connection-view.bats, line 110)
  `assert_output --partial "Invalid connection ID"' failed

-- output does not contain substring --
substring : Invalid connection ID
output    : Error: Access to this resource is unauthorized. | Short Description: Unauthenticated User | Probable Cause: You haven't logged in to Meshery. | Suggested Remediation: To proceed, log in using `mesheryctl system login`.
